MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Apr-25-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF MANUEL MENDOZA'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories is granted in part and denied in part. Granted as to Form Interrogatories 2.13 and 15.1, 16.7 and 20.8. The motion to compel as to Form Interrogatories 16.2 and 16.3 denied. The motion to compel is granted as to Form Interrogatory 17.1. Defendant must separately answer the form interrogatory with a particularized response for each request for admission that it denies. The omnibus answer provided is not comprehensible. Additional responses shall be served within fifteen days of the notice of entry of this Order. Both parties' requests for sanctions are denied. The Court signed the order that was submitted by email. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Apr-16-2014 Continued To Apr-25-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Helen Tokar, Esq. of the Law Offices of Katherine Lipel, Tel. 818.904.0100, for plaintiff and moving party, by Court Call;
Christopher L. Patton, Esq. of Toschi Sidran Collins & Doyle, Tel. 510.835.3400, for defendant and opposing party, by Court Call.

RULING: Plaintiff did not stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. At the conclusion of the hearing, PLAINTIFF MANUEL MENDOZA's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories is continued to April 25, 2014 at 9:30 am in Department 302. Judge Pro Tem shall prepare a Report and Recommendation. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

No appearances. There being no appearances, all parties to the motion are deemed to have stipulated to the matter being decided by Judge Pro Tem Thomas Cohen. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Granted in part and denied in part. Defendant shall serve verified responses to Plaintiff's Requests for Production, Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Requests for Admission on or before January 31, 2014. No sanctions.
